name: Sneaky Bit o' Digging
timing: Play after characters are deployed but before turn 1 begins.
description:
Choose a Moonstone then flip an Arcane Card and reduce the Depth Value by X to a minimum of 1, where X is the value of the card. Catastrophe: The Moonstone Depth Value stays the same.

If your troupe contains at least one *Rogue* you may choose another Moonstone and repeat this effect, flipping a new Arcane Card.
